rect.style: fill: none; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-width: 31px; stroke-dashoffset: 28px; stroke: rgb(212, 34, 34);

path.style: fill-opacity: 1; fill-rule: evenodd; stroke: none; stroke-width: 0.216; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-dasharray: none; fill: rgb(201, 46, 46);
fill-opacity: 1; fill-rule: evenodd; stroke: none; stroke-width: 0.216; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-dasharray: none; fill: rgb(201, 46, 46);
